response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video for on-screen text and audio. Identified song title 'LONELY ROLLING STAR' and attributed music to NAMCO/Yoshihito Yano from the Katamari Damacy game series.
2. Performed a web search for '"LONELY ROLLING STAR" NAMCO Japanese and English lyrics' and '"LONELY ROLLING STAR" Japanese lyrics' to obtain both versions.
3. Created the final JSON with the scene mapping and lyrics.
response.global_summary: A cover performance of the song "Lonely Rolling Star" from the Katamari Damacy game series, performed by two virtual YouTubers (VTubers).

scenes.description: Two VTubers perform a song together in a virtual 3D environment, with the text 'LONELY ROLLING STAR' displayed on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
陽だまり サンサン
ココロは ハレ模様
二つの 瞳は
ヒマワリ の種のよう
語らい 重なり
カタマリ カラマリ
一緒にいること
絶対 必然

でも あなた 大事な夢を描く
終わるまでは ずっと そう ここで待っている

You're lonely rolling star
立ち止まらないで ねえ
You're lonely rolling star
さあ 前を向いて行こう

星空 キラキラ
コンペイトウ のよう
甘くて 切ない
想いが 募るの
抱きしめた 想いは夜空を舞い
急降下して あなたの元へ
(届くかな)

YOU ARE LONELY ROLLING STAR
あきらめないで よね
YOU ARE LONELY ROLLING STAR
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Laying in the brilliant sun
The weather in my heart looks clear
The pupils of those two eyes
Just like sunflower seeds
Lovers' chats pile up, overlapping
A katamari, an entanglement
Being together
Is an absolute necessity
Except you are drawing out your important dream
Until you’re finished, I’ll be right here waiting for you

You're lonely rolling star
Don't you ever stop!
You're lonely rolling star
So, face forward and keep going!

A sky of stars, sparkling and glittering
Like dots of sugar candy...
Like something sweet and painful
My feelings are growing
The feelings I held in my heart fly through the night sky
And dive down to reach you (I wonder if they will reach?)

YOU ARE LONELY ROLLING STAR
Don't give up
YOU ARE LONELY ROLLING STAR

(Lyrics simplified for relevance)
